name: Best battle Cover Royale
description: Players from all over the world engage in fierce combat in Polygon TPS Shooting Online. By selecting their armament, attachments, and camouflage from various in-game options, ranging from handguns to sniper rifles, players may tailor their experience. In addition to choosing the weapons they employ, players can give their avatars a distinctive appearance by customizing their attire and accessories. Players can search maps to locate the finest vantage point for taking down rivals. What distinguishes Polygon TPS Shooting Online is the chance to play with others. The cooperative play mode allows players to outmanoeuvre their opponents through intelligent planning and coordinated attacks.
instructions: wasd- walk mouse- aim look around shoot tab- menu space- jump
